parameters.query:
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.telegram_id, u.first_name,
       up.wake_up_time, up.caloric_target, up.protein_target_g,
       mp.plan_json, mp.total_calories,
       g.target_weight, g.start_weight,
       wl.weight_kg AS current_weight
FROM users u
JOIN memberships m ON u.id = m.user_id AND m.status = 'active' AND m.expires_at > NOW()
JOIN user_profiles up ON u.id = up.user_id AND up.onboarding_completed = true
LEFT JOIN meal_plans mp ON u.id = mp.user_id AND mp.plan_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date AND mp.is_active = true
LEFT JOIN goals g ON u.id = g.user_id AND g.is_active = true
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT weight_kg FROM weight_logs WHERE user_id = u.id ORDER BY logged_at DESC LIMIT 1
) wl ON true
WHERE u.is_active = true
  AND ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (up.wake_up_time::time - LOCALTIME)) / 60) <= 15
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM conversation_logs cl
    WHERE cl.user_id = u.id AND cl.message_type = 'morning_briefing' AND cl.created_at::date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
  );
INSERT INTO conversation_logs (user_id, message_type, message_text, assistant_response, created_at) VALUES ($1, 'morning_briefing', '[proactive]', $2, NOW());

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.telegram_id, u.first_name,
       up.wake_up_time, up.caloric_target, up.protein_target_g,
       mp.plan_json, mp.total_calories,

LEFT JOIN meal_plans mp ON u.id = mp.user_id AND mp.plan_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date AND mp.is_active = true
LEFT JOIN goals g ON u.id = g.user_id AND g.is_active = true
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT weight_kg FROM weight_logs WHERE user_id = u.id ORDER BY logged_at DESC LIMIT 1
) wl ON true
WHERE u.is_active = true
  AND ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (up.wake_up_time::time - LOCALTIME)) / 60) <= 15
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM conversation_logs cl
    WHERE cl.user_id = u.id AND cl.message_type = 'morning_briefing' AND cl.created_at::date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
  );
INSERT INTO conversation_logs (user_id, message_type, message_text, assistant_response, created_at) VALUES ($1, 'morning_briefing', '[proactive]', $2, NOW());
